public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as fashion runner.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a fashion runner still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of fashion runner in and around Aurora Heights District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Heights District workable through the obligations of fashion runner while managing the immediate pressure of alliances in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Aurora Heights District, that usually means carrying alliances, espionage, elite reputation without letting the role of fashion runner visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Maren Starbloom can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Maren Starbloom needs help with a problem in Aurora Heights District that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Maren Starbloom carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Aurora Heights District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Shelk nobility, elite magistrates.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Heights District: the part of Aurora Heights District where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
